name: The Diamond Cutters(First Generation)
description:
Whisper: Your Plan Failed Mimic! And Now Your GONNA PAY FOR TRYING TO KILL US! I'll End You When I get MY HANDS ON YOU!

YOUR JUST A COWARD!

Here are the changes I made to The Diamond Cutters, which is down below:

The Diamond Cutters History: Behind the scenes, Mimic had secretly aligned himself with Eggman around the beginning of the Eggman War. One day at the base, he convinced the Diamond Cutters to attack a particular Eggman base to cause a blackout among the doctor's forces along the coastline. Though he insisted that everyone was needed on the field, Claire asked Whisper to hang back just in case. At the Eggman base, the Diamond Cutters were initially met with no resistance. Claire tried to use her psychic powers to understand the situation but she was being blocked by alpha waves. Smithy asked Mimic to scout around for an ambush while he, Slinger and Claire pushed ahead. When the trio seemed to find the source of the alpha waves, they continued on until Smithy noticed the capsules in the room; they were revealed to hold Shadow Androids. The room was suddenly locked which trapped Smithy, Slinger and Claire with several of the Shadow Androids emerging from their capsules. The trio tried to contact Whisper and Mimic but to no avail. However before the trio could be killed by Mimic's trap, The Phantom Rider had come out of nowhere, using his Gravity Control to make an escape route for The Trio, allowing them to escape certain death at the hands of Mimic's betrayal. Mimic, realizing he had failed and that The Diamond Cutters knew what he had tried to do, booked it. Although not before his Blue Wisp companion had left him and Mimic had his Concealer and Cube Wispon taken from him by a very angry Whisper.

Also added info about the eggman war so yeah!

FT(The Phantom Rider, Claire, Slinger, Smithy, Whisper, Sonic, Shadow, Silver, Tails, Knuckles, Amy, Rouge, Vector, Espio, Tangle, Surge, Kit, Metal Sonic, Eggman, Bunnie, Honey, Breezie, Mighty, Ray, E-123 Omega, The Deadly Six, Zavok, Master Zik, Zazz, Zeena, Zomom, Zor, Infinite, The Eggman Empire, The Eggman Empire’s Forces, The Restoration, Lanolin, Jewel, Mimic, and The Diamond Cutters.)

Important Locations on Mobius: Green Hill Zone, Revamped Eggman Land, Angel Island, Oil Ocean Zone, Old G.U.N Base, Phantom Zone, Chemical Plant, Sky Sanctuary, Speed Highway, City Escape, Seaside Hill, Crisis City, Rooftop Run, Space Colony Ark, Rail Canyon, Kingdom Valley, Sunset Heights, Chaos Island, Radical Highway, Barricade Town, Glass Hill, Floral Forest Village, Ice Paradise, Orchardville, Restoration HQ, Riverside, Seaside City, Sunset City, Spiral Hill Village, Turtleshell Island, Vista View, Windmill Village, Winterburg, Mineral Museum, and Forest Ridge Zone Campsite.

Casinos Breezie Owns: Casino Park(Breeze Media's capital and the site of several casinos), Casino Night Zone, Casino Paradise Zone, Casino Street Zone, and Casinopolis.

Planet’s Near Mobius: Planet Wisp and The Lost Hex.

Other Dimensions: Chaos Dimension

Important Locations On The Lost Hex: Windy Hill, Desert Ruins, Tropical Coast, Frozen Factory, Silent Forest, Sky Road, Lava Mountain, Zeti Castle, and The Hidden World.
creator: Rainbow_Raman
